text: A commercial driver not subject to the provisions of article 19-A (Special Requirements For Bus Drivers) or to the provisions of Transportation Law § 14-F (Transportation of hazardous materials) and hired on and after the effective date of this article shall not operate a commercial motor vehicle unless such driver has furnished the commercial motor carrier that employs the driver with a completed application for employment. Every commercial motor carrier shall prepare an application for employment which shall comply with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation.

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 19
##### § 509-Q — Application for employment

A commercial driver not subject to the provisions of article 19-A (Special Requirements For Bus Drivers) or to the provisions of Transportation Law § 14-F (Transportation of hazardous materials) and hired on and after the effective date of this article shall not operate a commercial motor vehicle unless such driver has furnished the commercial motor carrier that employs the driver with a completed application for employment. Every commercial motor carrier shall prepare an application for employment which shall comply with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: A commercial driver not subject to the provisions of article 19-A (Special Requirements For Bus Drivers) or to the provisions of Transportation Law § 14-F (Transportation of hazardous materials) and hired on and after the effective date of this article shall not operate a commercial motor vehicle unless such driver has furnished the commercial motor carrier that employs the driver with a completed application for employment. Every commercial motor carrier shall prepare an application for employment which shall comply with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation.
